chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3709 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on M.A 89/17 3. For hearing of main case 24.01.2019 No one is present. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing, which reflects that the petitioner has no interest to pursue this petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
